name: Sephylon, the Ultimate Timelord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>究</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>時</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>械</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>セフィロン
name_jp_tl: Sephylon, the Ultimate Time Machine God
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having 10 or more monsters in your GY. Once per turn: You can Special Summon 1 Level 8 or higher Fairy monster from your hand or GY, but its effects are negated, also its ATK becomes 4000.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having 10 or more monsters in your GY. Once per turn: You can Special Summon 1 Level 8 or higher Fairy monster from your hand or GY, but its effects are negated, also its ATK becomes 4000.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having 10 or more monsters in your GY. Once per turn: You can Special Summon 1 Level 8 or higher Fairy monster from your hand or GY, but its effects are negated, also its ATK becomes 4000.

sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
